calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The matter was taken off calendar due to lack of appearance and lack of any further filings.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2011 Continued To Sep-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amy Harrington for Daisy Somoza (Petitioner).

Judge Wiss disclosed that Counsel Amy Harrington is the Spouse of a fellow Bench Officer and that she does not feel that this fact will affect her ability to be fair and impartial to all Parties and all Counsel. Ms. Harrington stated that the real property apportion subject to the petition was transferred into joint tenancy in a refinance, that she needs to file an amended petition, that she needs to obtain bank statements but that there is no Personal Representative for the Estate and that she was not certain how her Client was going be able to obtain the bank statements for the accounts held in the Husbands name. The matter was continued to September 14, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
